scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check scripts/performance-budget.mjs && node --check scripts/release-auto.mjs && node --check scripts/release-preflight.mjs && node --check scripts/run-staging-live-qa.mjs && node --check scripts/vercel-ignore-build.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-ci-release-env.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-live-qa-env.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-local-live-isolation.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-production-deploy.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-production-safety-gate.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-staging-env.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-supabase-migrations.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-supabase-remote.mjs && node --check src/core/data-safety-contracts.cjs && node --check src/core/data-safety-contracts.mjs && node --check src/core/index.mjs && node --check src/modules/manifest.mjs && node --check src/modules/home/index.mjs && node --check src/modules/home/dashboard-renderer.mjs && node --check src/modules/chat/index.mjs && node --check src/modules/chat/chat-widget-renderer.mjs && node --check src/modules/schedule/index.mjs && node --check src/modules/squad/index.mjs && node --check src/modules/squad/players.mjs && node --check src/modules/squad/squad-adapter.mjs && node --check src/modules/game-simulator/index.mjs && node --check src/modules/game-simulator/runtime.mjs && node --check src/modules/game-simulator/workspace-controller.mjs && node --check src/modules/game-simulator/control-bindings.mjs && node --check src/modules/game-simulator/fullscreen.mjs && node --check src/modules/game-simulator/keyboard-state.mjs
scripts.qa: npm run verify:local-isolation && npm run check && npm run qa:supabase && npm run qa:perf && playwright test --config=qa/playwright.config.mjs
scripts.qa:contracts: playwright test --config=qa/playwright.config.mjs --project=api-contracts qa/platform-safety-contracts.api.spec.mjs qa/data-safety-contracts.api.spec.mjs qa/modular-core.api.spec.mjs qa/home-tasks-adapter.api.spec.mjs qa/home-chat-adapter.api.spec.mjs qa/home-dashboard-renderer.api.spec.mjs qa/home-chat-widget-renderer.api.spec.mjs qa/schedule-adapter.api.spec.mjs qa/squad-adapter.api.spec.mjs qa/squad-database-schema.api.spec.mjs qa/game-simulator-controller.api.spec.mjs qa/game-simulator-control-bindings.api.spec.mjs qa/game-simulator-fullscreen.api.spec.mjs qa/game-simulator-keyboard-state.api.spec.mjs
